def merge_users(existing, incoming):
    result = {}
    for user in existing:
        result[user["id"]] = user
    for user in incoming:
        result[user["id"]] = user
    return list(result.values())


def reconcile_inventory(stock_a, stock_b):
    merged = {}
    for item in stock_a:
        merged[item["sku"]] = item
    for item in stock_b:
        merged[item["sku"]] = item
    return list(merged.values())


def deduplicate_records(records):
    seen = {}
    for record in records:
        seen[record["email"]] = record
    return list(seen.values())


def combine_configs(base, override):
    combined = {}
    for key, value in base.items():
        combined[key] = value
    for key, value in override.items():
        combined[key] = value
    return combined
